name: Hot Lead Welcome Sequence
description: Auto-triggered when a lead score reaches 70+. Sends 3 personalized messages over 7 days.

steps.message: Hey {name}! We noticed you've been to a few of our events — that's awesome! We love having you in the TBP crew. Anything coming up you're excited about?
Hey {name}! Just wanted to let you know about {nextEvent}. Based on the events you've been to, we think you'd love it! Check it out: {eventUrl}
Hey {name}! Because you're one of our top supporters, we'd love to offer you VIP access to our next event. Reply "VIP" to get exclusive early access and a special discount. You deserve it!
